reviews.title: If you love an argument and would like…
reviews.body: If you love an argument and would like to be treated poorly, then choose Harpenden. No Compassion, no interest in the elderly at all.The worst building societ ever for customer service.Remember we all get old one day and confusion and a bad memory can hit anyone!

reviews.title: Quite friendly and very helpful branch…
reviews.body: Quite friendly and very helpful branch staff, but aggressive rate management, as others have mentioned. Rates on display in branch differ from website, banking registration process is terrible. Maybe helpful to IFAs but lending experiences for personal customers is poor.

reviews.title: Made Numerous mistakes when opening an ISA account...  NUMEROU
reviews.body: 1) emailed us and said we made numerous applications for an ISA (we only opened 1)2) Their paying in instructions are not written clearly.. they use a clearing bank and don't tell you so the numbers are tricky to get right..3) The worse mistake is that they spelt my surname wrong when they opened the account so I could not pay any money in ... called them and they made the change to the correct name and said I could pay in immediately ! WRONG I was told I had to wait an hour! WRONG (3rd time! ) just tried to pay in and still won't accept my name... REALLY!! Come on Harpenden you are a Building Society surely you can spell a name correctly! Your staff need extra training... I'm REALLY UNHAPPY about this ..

reviews.title: Not reducing variable mortgage rates in line with Bank of England
reviews.body: Mortgage holders beware. This lender was very quick to increase their variable mortgage rates when the Bank of England was doing so. However, they have double standards when the opposite is happening and the BoE rates are decreasing.Unlike my experience with other, more decent lenders, Harpenden BS prefer to pad their coffers instead of passing on the saving to the customer.

reviews.title: Uncompetitive rates on savings acciunts
reviews.body: My father set up an account for my grandson, and over the last year they have been cutting the rates on those accounts far faster than the bank of england rates. We get a letter every few weeks informing us of further changes (reduction) to their rates. These guys are a con, and their ‘special savings accounts’ do t offer competitive rates. Don’t use them.

reviews.title: Helpful staff
reviews.body: Helpful staff, good range of products, friendly and engaging

reviews.title: The Company failed to provide Me with…
reviews.body: The Company failed to provide Me with any notice or information either by email , post or text  when they were reducing  interest rates and when I made a complaint twice  they ignored Me and said they believed they had done nothing wrong . Terrible service and company

reviews.title: I can’t believe it’s 2024 and there’s…
reviews.body: I can’t believe it’s 2024 and there’s Company’s like this out there ??Have they not moved on with times etc etc..Obviously not.Been a Nightmare from start to finish,,Would I recommend them..NO 100%

reviews.title: Shambles
reviews.body: Opened an ISA in mid-February. Never received any confirmations or references that the account had been opened. Received an email addressed to another persons name! I had no faith after this so requested the account be closed. And, received no reply to this.I then contacted one of the managers (Jon - using an email address he supplies on another website) on 18th February for assistance. He hasn't responded - so don't hold out any hope he'll contact you back if you ever email him!

reviews.title: Not a great experience
reviews.body: Not a great experience.  Took ages for my account to be opened, they didn't send me any account information to pay money into the ISA, when I eventually got some details they didn't work.  Then they started sending me emails addressed to someone else.  I'm glad I wasn't able to transfer any money into this ISA as I am not convinced I would have been able to withdraw it without experience more problems.

reviews.title: I opened an instant access online…
reviews.body: I opened an instant access online savings account, paying 3.69%.  The account was opened within a day & available to use.  This interest rate beat Shawbrook Bank, who currently pay 3.65%.  Small difference, but obviously, the more money you save, the more difference it makes.

reviews.title: Not so good old days...
reviews.body: Dealing with this company was like going back in time 30 years. The product was a holiday let mortgage in Cornwall an old Mill with 9 acres of fields and a barn. Most lenders stipulate a maximum number of acres if it is a problem for them. Harpenden didn't care about the number of acres they said (well ImpactFS said to my broker and then my broker told me).They insist you come through their packager Impact who delayed the process by taking money and not processing the application straight away. Harpenden say they will respond in 5 working days, only to ask more questions. Questions they do not understand the answer to. I said the 9 acres are mostly agricultural land use registered but the property is not agricultural tied, meaning you don't have to be a farm worker to live there. They took the latter to mean the 9 acres was residential and proceeded to waste the next 5 weeks to come back and say they would lend if I split the title deed! Something that currently is taking 8 months with the land registry and is no simple matter. I explained this was not easy task and that they had totally messed me around. They pointed the finger back at me saying they weren't told it was agricultural class land, no apology. 6 weeks wasted. 6 weeks I don't have to waste.Do not use this company, they will go into minute detail of your finances, asked about my ISA and Savings accounts, my broker even said my income was more than enough to cover the loan and he couldn't understand it.They are an old fashioned lender that is too risk averse and prints off all documents and hands them to an underwriter to review at great length. All for a mortgage less than 70%LTV that is already being let and bringing in a very good revenue.
